Shirakabegura MIO Sparkling
menu.description: This sparkling sake has a pleasing flavor of pear and grapes. The gently sweet flavor combines with a moderate acidity, which makes this sake a particularly delightful aperitif

menu.name: Shirakabegura Junmai Daiginjo
menu.description: Both fragrant and fruity with an unctuous texture, it expresses subtle aromas of pear, melon and banana and a sweetness that suggests honey.

menu.name: Shirakabegura Kimoto Ginjo
menu.description: Its smooth and round aroma profile, wrapped in a silky texture, reveals notes of apple, pear, and dried fruit, as well as a light acidity and a tasty umami

menu.name: Asahi Shuzo Dassai 45
menu.description: Textured and luxurious with a fine finish. One of the most famous Junmai Daiginjo Sake in the world.

menu.name: Kikumasamune Taruzake Junmai Tokkuri
menu.description: This premium sake, rested in cedar wood barrels, is rounded and pleasing with earthy wood spice incense, peppercorn, pine, green apple and blossom flavours.

menu.name: Kikumasamune Junmai Kojo
menu.description: This sake is brewed using the brewer's newly invented original yeast. This new yeast brings out the fruity Ginjo characteristics. Nose of crisp apple & is delicate sweetness uniquely balanced with the umami of Junmai.

menu.name: Hakkaisan Nigori Umeshu
menu.description: Hakkaisan's Nigori Umeshu is made with 100% domestic plums which are soaked in Hakkaisan shochu to produce the Nigori umeshu. The pleasant aroma and deep taste come from the added plum pulp. Enjoy this rich Umeshu on ice, pure or with sparkling water.

Guinness
menu.description: What can we say about Guinness ~ you just have to try it! Made just a mile up the road, sit back, relax and enjoy a pint of the black stuff. Dublin, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Beamish
menu.description: Beamish Irish Stout has been brewed in Cork since 1972. Beamish is a flavoursome stout with hints of coffee and dark chocolate. Cork, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Eventide Rye River Irish Stout
menu.description: A traditional Irish stout with a silky coffee, chocolate and toffee aroma. A delicate and balanced bitterness that finishes dry like a great Irish stout should! Co. Kildare , IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rye River Big Bangin' IPA
menu.description: Our take on the U.S. West Coast IPA style using only the finest malted Maris Otter Barley and heavily hopped with tropical aromatic hop varieties. Co. Kildare, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rye River Irish Red Rogue
menu.description: Aromatic, malt driven Irish red ale bringing through aromatic caramel malts. Aroma of biscuit, roast caramel and dark fruits balanced by an earthy bitter tone. Co. Kildare, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rye River Lil’ Bangin Session IPA
menu.description: A smooth and sessionable IPA with intense aromas of juicy ripe fruit, tangerine and pine which follow through to a silky body. Co. Kildare, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rye River Bidin’ Time Irish Lager
menu.description: An Irish lager German inspired. Lagered longer than most. Brewed with German hops, German malt and German lager yeast. Co. Kildare, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rye River Upstream Pale Ale
menu.description: A balance of bitter citrus hop character with a soft malt body pushing through the aroma of grapefruit, orange peel and pine. A light body and a touch of honey. Co. Kildare, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rockshore
menu.description: A light beer from the makers of Guinness inspired by the rugged landscape of the west of Ireland. Dublin, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Rockshore Cider
menu.description: A light, crisp, refreshing taste with a less sweet taste than other cider inspired by the bracing refreshment of the Atlantic coast. Dublin, IRELAND. (Sulphites)

menu.name: Smithwicks
menu.description: Smithwicks is an Irish red ale style beer from Kilkenny, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Carlsberg
menu.description: A German pilsner style beer brewed by Carlsberg. DENMARK. (Barley)

menu.name: Coors Light
menu.description: Coors Light is a light beer brewed in Golden, Colorado, USA. (Barley & Wheat)

menu.name: Heineken
menu.description: A Dutch pale lager beer first brewed in 1873, HOLLAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Bulmers
menu.description: Ireland’s favourite cider. Patiently vat matured to deliver a pure and natural character. Tipperary, IRELAND. (Sulphites)

menu.name: O’Hara’s 51st State IPA
menu.description: A New England style IPA bursting with bold tropical flavours of grapefruit, passion fruit, apricot and peach. Co. Carlow, IRELAND. (Barley & Wheat)

menu.name: O’Hara’s Falling Apple Cider
menu.description: The Carlow Brewing Company’s first craft cider. We hope you enjoy! Co. Carlow, IRELAND. (Sulphites)

menu.name: O’Hara’s Irish Nitro Red Ale
menu.description: Creamy with hints of sweet caramel and mild nutty biscuit. Co. Carlow, IRELAND. (Barley & Wheat)

menu.name: Orchard Thieves Cider
menu.description: Crafted from the perfect mix of crisp and tart apples for an instant fresh apple taste, Orchard Thieves really cuts through and instantly refreshes. U.K. (Sulphites)

menu.name: Hop House 13 Lager
menu.description: A full flavoured, double hopped lager from Guinness made with Irish barley and aromatic hops for a refreshingly crisp taste. IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Birra Moretti
menu.description: Genuine Italian beer produced using a traditional process. ITALY. (Barley)

menu.name: Guinness 00
menu.description: Guinness 00 provides the iconic taste of Guinness draught, rich and creamy with a velvety finish but with no alcohol. Dublin, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: O’ Brother Dreamcatcher Session IPA
menu.description: Bold with lots of punch, lovely grapefruit and orange balances the juicy, tropical hop flavours finishing clean and fresh. Co Wicklow, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: O’ Brother The Chancer Pale Ale
menu.description: A bold and fresh American pale ale. Floral on the nose with fresh herbal notes and grapefruit citrus. Co Wicklow, IRELAND. (Barley)

menu.name: Corona
menu.description: Golden lager, slightly fruity with a crisp but refreshing bitterness. MEXICO. (Barley)

menu.description: Teeling Single Malt, lemon juice, sweet and sour syrup, Angostura bitters

menu.name: Ca' Del Doge Cabernet Veneto IGT
menu.description: A soft easy drinking Cabernet Sauvignon with gentle tannins and ripe black fruit flavours. Great for barbeques and for parties

menu.name: Domaine Castelnau Merlot / Cabernet
menu.description: This is a wonderful easy to drink wine with lots of red fruit flavours, good acidity and tannin. Light medium in body and well balanced. Enjoy with light snacks

menu.name: Rosé Wine Cal y Canto Rosado
menu.description: Wonderfully light and fruity Spanish wine. Perfect for sunny weather drinking or for light seafood and salad dishes

menu.name: Vignoble Gibault Sauvignon VDL
menu.description: A classic style Loire Valley Sauvignon Blanc. A dry white wine full of freshness and elegance, lively, and very fragrant with aromas of pear, grapefruit and pineapple

menu.name: Serenissima Pinot Grigio
menu.description: A real tasty fruity wine with a slight after-taste of bitter almond. That is an ideal pairing with light dishes such as salads and seafood

menu.name: Domaine Castelnau Chardonnay Les Ronces
menu.description: An elegant chardonnay. Fruity notes enhanced by subtle spiced aromas giving a certain balance to the wine

menu.name: La farra Valdobbiadene Prosecco Frizzante
menu.description: From the renowned vineyard “Rive of Nardi” located in the upper hills of Farra di Soligo in Italy this Prosecco benefited from the best conditions and offers up surprising levels of fruitiness of and depth of flavour
